title: impatiens vilersii var. pilosella
intro: Impatiens vilersii var. pilosella, also known as Himalayan balsam, is a plant species that belongs to the balsam family and is native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Himalayan balsam include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
